command: echo '=== TRAEFIK LOGS (acme/cert/error) ===' && docker compose -f /opt/n8n-traefik/compose.yaml logs traefik 2>&1 | grep -iE 'acme|cert|letsencrypt|error|challeng' | tail -50 && echo '' && echo '=== TRAEFIK COMPOSE ===' && cat /opt/n8n-traefik/compose.yaml && echo '' && echo '=== TRAEFIK DYNAMIC CONFIGS ===' && find /opt/n8n-traefik -type f -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' -o -name '*.toml' 2>/dev/null | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---"; cat "$f"; echo; done && echo '=== ACME.JSON ===' && ls -la /opt/n8n-traefik/letsencrypt/ 2>/dev/null && echo '=== TRAEFIK VOLUME MOUNTS ===' && docker inspect n8n-traefik-traefik-1 --format '{{range .Mounts}}{{.Source}} -> {{.Destination}} ({{.Type}}){{println}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== TRAEFIK CMD ===' && docker inspect n8n-traefik-traefik-1 --format '{{.Config.Cmd}}' 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== TRAEFIK ENTRYPOINTS ===' && docker inspect n8n-traefik-traefik-1 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null
intent: Diagnose why acme.json is empty — check Traefik logs, compose, volumes
